_meta.description: Shared data block placed on sheet 'T' of the oracle workbook. Every case formula references this block. One case per row, formula in column G, starting at G1, functions in sorted-key order, cases in listed order.
notes: All B-column values are stored as TEXT (including '2026-03-15', '100', '-5').

B7 (the empty string) is materialized as a BLANK cell in both engines: openpyxl cannot persist a bare empty-string literal and ironcalc's set_user_input('') clears the cell, so blank is the only representation both sides can share.

The workbook generator adds Excel OOXML storage prefixes (_xlfn., _xlfn._xlws.) to post-2007 function names before writing; the formulas here are the canonical Excel-UI spellings and are fed verbatim to ironcalc.
